name: antigravity-restores-conversation
description: Restore lost conversation history and missing workspaces for Antigravity IDE

scripts.build:exe:win: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --target=18.15.0 && npm run build && npx pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/antigravity-restores-conversation-win.exe
scripts.build:exe:mac: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --target=18.15.0 && npm run build && npx pkg . --targets node18-macos-x64 --output bin/antigravity-restores-conversation-macos
scripts.build:exe:linux: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --target=18.15.0 && npm run build && npx pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64 --output bin/antigravity-restores-conversation-linux
